name: Comprehensive Responsive Design - All Screen Sizes
description: Test the app layout and UX across multiple screen sizes: mobile (360px, 480px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1024px, 1280px+). Verify all sections adapt correctly.

planSteps.description: Set browser viewport to 360x800 pixels (small mobile)
Verify bottom navigation icons and labels are visible and properly sized
Click on the Logs navigation button and verify the monthly overview and daily history table are readable
Set browser viewport to 480x900 pixels (large mobile)
Verify header title and action buttons (language toggle, theme toggle, notifications) are properly spaced
Click on the Payroll navigation button
Verify payroll summary numbers are clearly displayed with positive values in green and negative values in red
Verify the day editor table columns (Date, Day, Status, Late, OT, Note) are all visible without horizontal scroll
Verify the app uses wider layout effectively with more spacious card padding
Click on the Dashboard section and verify the quick actions grid shows all 4 buttons (Sick Leave, Vacation, Overtime, Remote) in a row
Verify the main content has max-width constraint centered on screen
Verify bottom navigation is styled for desktop with rounded container and centered items
Navigate to each section (Dashboard, Settings, Payroll, Logs) and verify all content loads without layout breaks
